title: generated fake judgments a worldwide menace: Supreme Court
description: The Bench was dealing with a special leave petition seeking to expunge the remarks made by Bombay High Court after the petitioner cited a non-existent judgment generated using artificial intelligence in a case under the Maharashtra Rent Control Act.
content:
As AI-generated non-existent judgments continue to trouble the judiciary, the Supreme Court has cautioned litigants against it, saying they needed to be careful.

title: Artificial intelligence-led Alpha school is opening in Chicago
description: Alpha School, a network of AI-based private schools is opening a K-8 campus in the Chicago Loop in the fall.
content: On an unseasonably warm day in Chicago, Blake Mohseni stepped out for a walk and fielded a call about a school his 3-year-old daughter is still too young to attend. Mohseni — who works in finance and describes himself as “deep in AI” — is among the f... [7687 chars]

title: Smaller Is Better in Silicon Valley’s ‘Tiny Team’ Moment
description: As artificial intelligence takes on more and more tasks, tech executives are embracing teams as small as two: one person plus A.I.
content: In many industries, leading a big team is a flex. A large head count implies a large budget, and suggests that your organization is powerful and making things happen. But lately, in the world of start-ups, some founders have been bragging about doing... [1577 chars]

title: Trump wants a deadlocked Congress to move on AI. Frustrated states say they already have
description: State lawmakers have been stepping in to regulate artificial intelligence, clashing with the federal government's inaction as concerns about oversight and safety grow.

title: Global Artificial Intelligence Confluence 2026 Unites Minds for Innovation
description: The Global AI Confluence 2026 at Deen Dayal Upadhyaya Gorakhpur University convened over 180 delegates from 26 countries. The event focused on AI innovation and its socio-economic impacts. Key speakers highlighted ethical AI use and stressed the importance of indigenous AI models to prevent global monopolies.
